Currency Ordering â Cash Location Update
We updated the Currency Ordering Part in the Payment Solutions Manual to clarify that a cash order location must be a branch or ATM address. If your financial institution wants to have cash delivered to a different location (e.g., to a customer), youâll need to make your own arrangements after the cash order from RBC is delivered to your branch.
Currency Volume
Currency Ordering Part
Section 4.3, Creating a Cash Order Location
Section 4.4, Updating a Cash Order Location or Limit
We clarified that a cash order location must be a branch or ATM address.
